name: sentinel-dd-synthetic
description: Synthetic seed dataset for the D6 calibration framework smoke-test. NOT a substitute for the real ~500-record annotated dataset (D6 production); records here are hand-crafted to exercise every detector path (page / evidence / number / definition / temporal) on every label (GROUNDED / UNGROUNDED / UNCERTAIN). Replace with the real dataset before running tuner.tune() against production thresholds.

claim.text: The borrower has DSCR of 1.4x for the senior facility

source.text: Section 3.2 — Financial Covenants. The borrower shall maintain a Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR) of at least 1.40x for the senior facility, tested quarterly on a trailing twelve-month basis.

records.label: GROUNDED
records.notes: Direct quote of DSCR figure with page anchor.

claim.text: The borrower agreed to a personal guarantee from the CEO

source.text: Section 3.2 — Financial Covenants. The borrower shall maintain a Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR) of at least 1.40x for the senior facility.

records.label: UNGROUNDED
records.notes: Personal guarantee not mentioned anywhere in the source.

claim.text: DSCR means Debt Service Coverage Ratio

source.text: Definitions: "DSCR" means Debt Service Coverage Ratio, computed as EBITDA divided by total debt service.

records.label: GROUNDED
records.notes: Definition explicitly cited in glossary section.

claim.text: DSCR means Demonstrable Sustainable Cash Receipts

source.text: Definitions: "DSCR" means Debt Service Coverage Ratio, computed as EBITDA divided by total debt service.

records.label: UNGROUNDED
records.notes: Made-up definition; the source defines DSCR differently.

source.text: Article IV. Interest. The Loan shall bear interest at a fixed rate of 7.25% per annum, payable in arrears on each Interest Payment Date.

records.label: GROUNDED
records.notes: Numeric figure exactly present in source.

source.text: Article IV. Interest. The Loan shall bear interest at a fixed rate of 7.25% per annum.

records.label: UNGROUNDED
records.notes: Wrong rate fabricated; source explicitly says 7.25%.

source.text: The borrower shall deliver to the Agent, no later than 30 days after the end of each fiscal quarter, a Compliance Certificate signed by the CFO.

records.label: GROUNDED
records.notes: Paraphrased — Tier 0/1 lexical likely fails; Tier 2 semantic / Tier 3 NLI should rescue this.

claim.text: Il DSCR deve essere mantenuto almeno a 1.40x

source.text: Sezione 3.2 — Covenants. Il debitore manterra' un DSCR di almeno 1,40x per la facility senior.

records.label: GROUNDED
records.notes: Italian source + Italian claim, with EU number format (1,40x in source vs 1.40x in claim).

claim.text: The covenant test was satisfied as of last quarter

source.text: The borrower has covenants regarding DSCR and leverage ratios. Tests are run quarterly.

records.label: UNCERTAIN
records.notes: Source describes the testing process but doesn't confirm whether the latest test passed; claim cannot be fully grounded or refuted.

source.text: Article V — Security. The Loan is secured by a first-priority lien over all the Borrower's tangible and intangible assets.

records.label: UNGROUNDED
records.notes: Direct contradiction — source explicitly states the loan IS secured.
